title: Information Retrieval Suggested Learning Resource Flow
description: A visual representation of the types of resources available for learning Module 5 concepts and the recommended path for engaging with them.
elements: Practical Exercises & Coding Projects (e.g., using Python)
relationships: Core Textbook provides the foundational theory which is supplemented by Academic Papers for deeper insight. Both are supported by Online Tutorials for alternative explanations. Knowledge is then applied through Practical Exercises, with support sought from Discussion Forums when needed.
